text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's, and the top star<n>makes her
entrance, boldly pushing<n>past the festive
decorations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, Trainer! A heretofore unseen<n>year is upon
us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My beauty must have drawn it forth<n>like a magnet.
Ah, where are my<n>manners? Happy New Overlord!
choice_data_list: Do you want some New Year's mochi?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mochi! How timely—I graciously<n>accept.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: After we finish eating...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Last year marked my debut, and<n>accordingly from
there, a host of other<n>achievements.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, the world is yet distracted<n>with racers of
the generation before<n>mine.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Grass composed a poem, they<n>whisper. "Sky
frolicked with a cat,"<n>they murmur...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But this year, I, too, shall run in the<n>Classics.
Therefore, once spring has<n>passed, I can
challenge them directly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once this new star surpasses them<n>and becomes
a soloist, the cast list<n>will be turned on its head.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heheh! Trainer, let us make this theyear the torch is passed to me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
For all her newfound braggadocio, her<n>goals
haven't changed.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's my job to turn T.M. Opera O into<n>the ultimate
Centurial Overlord, so<n>there's no avoiding the
more<n>experienced runners if we're going to
succeed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The previous generation are all very<n>skilled. It may
come back to hurt me if<n>my preparations are
anything less<n>than stupendous.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must act now if I'm to take the torch<n>this year.
But my actions must be<n>grand in scale, something
overlordly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is why I turn to you, Trainer, o<n>brilliant
beautician of mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I need something befitting the<n>Overlord! What is it?
Speak and I will<n>eagerly follow.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Something overlordly... What should it<n>be?
choice_data_list: Being reborn more powerful in a parallel universe.
A soothing rose bath atop a storied castle.

Broadening our perspective by listening to public
opinion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Reincarnation in another world! Yes,<n>that does
have an "Overlord" ring to it,<n>though I am not sure
why.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is my first time, but I shall<n>attempt to visualize
the events. A top<n>tier opera star is caught up in an
accident and transported to a<n>completely different
world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Where am I? Who am I?Have I... been sent to an unknownrealm?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This power swelling from within me...<n>Yes! I have
been reborn as... the<n>Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, since I was the Overlord in my<n>past life, to
be the Overlord again<n>doesn't make for much of a
change...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, that matters not! My outlook is as<n>fresh as the
scenery! Haaah ha ha<n>ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Although there was no real, dramatic<n>change from
Opera O's reincarnation,<n>I can tell her power has
increased<n>just a little.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, yes! Bathing atop a castle's high<n>tower! That
is a New Year's activity<n>befitting the Overlord if
I've ever<n>heard one!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Make it so—to the stage above the<n>clouds!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Looking down at the<n>land below
from a rose bath on high,<n>what could be more
soothing?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just look at the mountains of plastic<n>bags stacked
up around the<n>academy! What garbage!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O thoroughly enjoys the bath<n>and seems
completely refreshed.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Public opinion? Interesting... Stylishly<n>lending my
ear to their voices is yet<n>another form of beauty,
after all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A wonderful suggestion. We should<n>prepare the
stage now! I'll call the<n>event, "New Year, New Me!
Life<n>Wisdom from the Top Opera Star"!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, Opera O? I'm thinking about<n>becoming a stage
actor, but I just<n>don't know if it's right for me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A stage actor is not something youbecome. It becomes you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thinking is wholly unnecessary!<n>People will flock
to those who<n>naturally exude the aura of a star!

text_block_list.name: Garoto A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Opera O! I didn't get enough<n>New Year's
money!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then dance, sing, and write<n>autographs at your
next family<n>gathering!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Money will come flying to you, no<n>doubt! A flair for
the dramatic can<n>make anything come true!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She draws her answers out of thin<n>air, yet each
time, they surprisingly hit<n>the mark. Hearing from
all these<n>people seems to have expanded her
horizons.
